chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 308 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2660/2018 24.10.2025 Mr. Naveed Ahmed, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the applicant Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondents This reference application is pending since 2018 without any progress. Even today, a brief is held and adjournment is sought for no cogent reason. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
